description: Sets SPF (so your provider can send mail for this domain) and DMARC (in monitoring mode) so your warming emails authenticate. DKIM is generated by your email provider (Google Workspace / Microsoft 365) and must be added separately.
variableDescription: spfInclude is the SPF include for your email provider — e.g. _spf.google.com for Gmail / Google Workspace, or spf.protection.outlook.com for Microsoft 365 / Outlook.

records.data: v=DMARC1; p=none; sp=none; adkim=r; aspf=r; pct=100; fo=1; rua=mailto:dmarc@%domain%
